# FastQueue

> Production-Ready Job System & Thread Pool

High-performance, cross-platform C23 library for concurrent task execution with work-stealing, futures, and custom allocators.

## Table of Contents

### Introduction

- [Getting Started](/FastQueue/guide/getting-started.md): Learn how to install and set up FastQueue, a high-performance C23 thread pool and job system library.
- [Installation](/FastQueue/guide/installation.md): Detailed installation guide for FastQueue across all platforms and package managers.
- [Quick Start](/FastQueue/guide/quick-start.md): Write your first FastQueue program in minutes. Learn thread pools, job submission, and futures with complete C and C++ examples.

### Core Concepts

- [Thread Pool](/FastQueue/guide/thread-pool.md): Learn how to configure and use the FastQueue thread pool with work stealing, task submission, and lifecycle management.
- [Scheduler](/FastQueue/guide/scheduler.md): Learn about the FastQueue job scheduler with work stealing, priority support, and statistics.
- [Futures](/FastQueue/guide/futures.md): Learn how to use FastQueue futures for awaitable task results with spin-then-wait strategy.
- [Memory Management](/FastQueue/guide/memory.md): Learn about FastQueue custom allocators and memory management for constrained environments.

### Advanced

- [Performance](/FastQueue/guide/performance.md): FastQueue performance characteristics, benchmarking results, and optimization tips.
- [Troubleshooting](/FastQueue/guide/troubleshooting.md): Common issues and solutions for FastQueue thread pool library.
- [FAQ](/FastQueue/guide/faq.md): Frequently asked questions about FastQueue thread pool and job system library.

### Examples

- [Examples](/FastQueue/examples.md): Complete collection of FastQueue examples for all features.
- [Basic Jobs Example](/FastQueue/examples/basic-jobs.md): Complete example of submitting and executing basic jobs with the FastQueue thread pool.
- [Futures Example](/FastQueue/examples/futures.md): Complete example of using FastQueue futures for awaitable task results.
- [Parallel For Example](/FastQueue/examples/parallel-for.md): Process array elements in parallel using the FastQueue thread pool.
- [Custom Allocator Example](/FastQueue/examples/custom-allocator.md): Use a custom allocator with FastQueue for memory-constrained environments.
- [Graceful Shutdown Example](/FastQueue/examples/graceful-shutdown.md): Properly shut down a FastQueue scheduler with graceful task completion.
- [Error Handling Example](/FastQueue/examples/error-handling.md): Proper error handling patterns for FastQueue operations.

### API Reference

- [API Overview](/FastQueue/api/overview.md): Complete API reference for FastQueue C23 thread pool and job system library.
- [Thread Pool API](/FastQueue/api/thread_pool.md): FastQueue thread pool API reference with creation, submission, and lifecycle functions.
- [Scheduler API](/FastQueue/api/scheduler.md): FastQueue scheduler API reference with configuration, submission, and lifecycle functions.
- [Queue API](/FastQueue/api/queue.md): FastQueue thread-safe MPMC queue API reference.
- [Future API](/FastQueue/api/future.md): FastQueue future API reference for awaitable task results.
- [Task API](/FastQueue/api/task.md): FastQueue task API reference for creating and managing individual tasks.
- [Memory API](/FastQueue/api/memory.md): FastQueue memory allocator API reference for custom memory management.
- [Errors API](/FastQueue/api/errors.md): FastQueue error codes and error handling API reference.
- [Parallel For API](/FastQueue/api/parallel.md): FastQueue parallel for-loop utility API reference for distributing iterations across worker threads.
- [Time API](/FastQueue/api/time.md): FastQueue time utilities API reference for monotonic clocks and high-resolution timers.
- [Config API](/FastQueue/api/config.md): FastQueue configuration constants and build options reference.
- [Version API](/FastQueue/api/version.md): FastQueue version information and compatibility API reference.
